description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light brown, leather-like material with a subtle marbled texture. The sofa features a modern, boxy silhouette with straight, clean lines and a low profile. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, creating a seamless and uniform appearance across the entire seating area. The armrests are wide, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's geometric and minimalist design. No legs are visible, as the base extends fully to the floor, giving the sofa a grounded and monolithic look. The upholstery appears smooth with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the cushioning.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with integrated cushions and a light brown, leather-like upholstery. It has a modern, boxy design with wide, flat armrests and a seamless, floor-length base.
description_view_0: The L-shaped configuration is clearly visible, showing the continuous seat and back cushions and the wide, flat armrests.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front-facing seating area and the seamless integration of the cushions and armrests.
description_view_2: The side profile reveals the full height of the backrest and armrest, as well as the solid, floor-length base.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile emphasizes the sofa's monolithic base and the straight, unbroken lines of the backrest and armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions on the longer section, two seat cushions and two back cushions on the shorter section; all cushions are attached, uniform in size, and seamlessly integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with no decorative elements or material contrast; minimalist and boxy in profile.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a continuous, solid plinth that extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a monolithic block.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, and continuous backrest that is integrated with the armrests and seat cushions, with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light brown color with a subtle marbled texture; the surface appears smooth and matte with no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
